continents.name: Aethermoor
continents.description: Large continental landmass divided into five regions.

regions.name: The Western Reach
regions.climate: Temperate maritime overall, distinct microclimates city to city.
regions.shape_note: Wide and shallow — twice as far east-west as north-south.
regions.notes: The Syndicate operates here and nowhere else. Eight sealed demon chambers distributed across this region.

regions.name: The Northern Reaches
regions.notes: Begins immediately north of Cindermarch. No merchant-council structure. Cindermarch exists specifically because of active conflict with whatever comes from here. Raiding culture implied.

regions.name: The Eastern Interior
regions.climate: Drier, more extreme temperature swings between seasons.
regions.notes: Begins past Valdmere and the mountains. City-states rather than merchant-council model. Valdmere's frontier feeling comes partly from proximity to this region.

regions.name: The Southern Reach
regions.notes: Distinct language entirely unrelated to Western Reach tongues. Sovi comes from here. Petra has partial fluency in Sovi's language suggesting some historical contact between regions.

regions.name: The Deep Interior
regions.notes: Heartland connecting all other regions, belonging to none. Largely unmapped. Dwarven presence suggested by Tormund Coalbeard's background. No roads established, no cities known.

continents.name: Yetgrese
continents.description: Second continent. Seven to eight days sailing from Aethermoor's western coast.
continents.climate: Warmer overall than Aethermoor based on position.
continents.notes: Dangerous crossing — weather, distance, and navigation all factors. Small enough that most Aethermoor residents have never met anyone from there. Occasional traders make the crossing. No cities, factions, or geography established.

cities.name: Valdmere
cities.description: Northwest coast, faces south. Frontier port.

cities.name: Cindermarch
cities.description: Military fortress on the Northern Reaches border.
cities.notes: 1 day north of Millhaven, 3 days northeast of Khemrise, 4-5 days ride from Ravenquay.

cities.name: Millhaven
cities.notes: 2 days northeast of Khemrise, 1 day south of Cindermarch, 4 days north of Ravenquay.

cities.name: Khemrise
cities.description: Major coastal city, vineyards. Pivot point where the coast turns north-south.
cities.notes: 2 days sail north of Trevash, 3 days sail north of Ravenquay.

cities.name: Trevash
cities.notes: 2 days sail south of Khemrise, 1 day sail north of Ravenquay.

cities.name: Ravenquay
cities.description: River delta. Dawn Blades home base.
cities.notes: 1 day sail south of Trevash, 3 days sail south of Khemrise.

cities.name: Argentveil
cities.description: Southern coast after eastward bend. Warmest, most cosmopolitan.

wilderness.name: Crossroads Rest
wilderness.description: Waystation on main road. 2 days north of Ravenquay toward Millhaven.

wilderness.name: Verath Ohn
wilderness.description: Off southern coast, in the water.
